decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing cards that allow for aggressive creature plays, while also utilizing blink effects to repeatedly trigger powerful enter-the-battlefield effects. Cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Guide of Souls provide aggressive creatures that can be blinked for additional value with cards like Ephemerate. Quantum Riddler and Witch Enchanter provide additional value with their triggers when creatures enter the battlefield. Teferi, Time Raveler can disrupt opponents while Recruiter of the Guard can search for key creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures and disruptive plays.

This deck focuses on a combination of aggressive creatures and cards that allow for repeated blinking effects, enabling strategic gameplay and evasion of opponent's strategies. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp, along with powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly while maintaining control of the battlefield. Additionally, the inclusion of disruptive cards like Thoughtseize and Prismatic Ending further adds to the deck's versatility and ability to adapt to different situations during the game.

This deck focuses on quickly and aggressively building a board presence with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Scion of Draco. The deck also utilizes powerful removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Consign to Memory to control the opponent's board. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding provide additional support to protect your creatures and disrupt your opponent's strategies. With a mix of land disruption and evasion, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, versatile threats and put them on the back foot from the start.

The deck focuses on quickly playing artifacts and utilizing them to control the board and pressure the opponent. It aims to flood the board with artifacts to take advantage of the affinity mechanic, while also having access to disruptive elements like Engineered Explosives and Pithing Needle. Urza's Saga and Emry, Lurker of the Loch provide strong synergy with artifacts, allowing for consistent card advantage and powerful plays. The deck looks to win through a combination of early aggression and resilient threats, backed up by a solid mix of disruption and card selection.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. It utilizes burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Discharge to clear the way for attacks, while also using Goblin Bombardment for extra reach. Ranger-Captain of Eos helps tutor for key creatures, and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides added value by creating tokens and protecting the board. The deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain tempo to close out games swiftly.

Utilizing instant spells and reanimation effects, this deck aims to quickly bring back powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to the battlefield. The combination of Goryo's Vengeance and Psychic Frog allows for swift graveyard plays, while cards like Solitude and Force of Negation provide protection and disruption against opposing strategies. The deck also includes ways to control the opponent's hand with Thoughseize and Prismatic Ending, ensuring that the combo can go off without interference. By efficiently reanimating key creatures, this deck can overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and then use spells like Unearth and Persist to bring them back onto the battlefield for a powerful reanimation combo. Thoughtseize and Spell Pierce help control the opponent's strategy while Faithless Looting and Thought Scour help with card draw and graveyard filling. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful reanimated creatures and disrupt their game plan with a mix of control and aggressive tactics.

The deck focuses on quickly and aggressively dealing damage to the opponent using cheap and efficient spells like Lightning Bolt, Mutagenic Growth, and Lava Dart, along with creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler. It also includes cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Cori-Steel Cutter to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win the game as quickly as possible by putting pressure on the opponent with a mix of burn spells and aggressive creatures, while also maintaining card advantage with cards like Preordain and Mishra's Bauble.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly flood the board with artifacts and utilize them to both attack opponents aggressively and disrupt their strategies. By leveraging cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Urza's Saga, the deck can generate powerful synergies and overwhelm opponents with a combination of creature and spell-based threats. The inclusion of cards like Claws of Gix and Tormod's Crypt also enables the deck to disrupt graveyard strategies, making it a versatile and potentially lethal choice for Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on aggressively reducing your own life total to maximize the power of Death's Shadow and other cards that benefit from lower life totals. It includes a suite of cheap and efficient cards that disrupt the opponent's game plan while also progressing your own strategy. The deck aims to apply pressure quickly and efficiently, utilizing various synergies and strong threats to close out the game before the opponent can recover. The deck has a low curve and aims to outpace the opponent with its aggressive plays and powerful creatures.

The deck focuses on using artifacts to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. It utilizes the Affinity mechanic to play artifacts for cheap or for free, allowing for explosive starts and strong mid-game tempo plays. The deck also includes a variety of control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own threats. The strategy revolves around utilizing artifact synergies and efficient mana usage to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent, creating a fast-paced and powerful aggressive game plan.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent by playing aggressive creatures and efficiently removing threats with burn spells. The deck aims to maintain card advantage and tempo through cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Expressive Iteration, while also utilizing the graveyard with Dragon's Rage Channeler. By constantly pressuring the opponent with cheap creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter, as well as using cards like Lava Dart and Lightning Bolt to control the board, this deck seeks to win the game in a fast and aggressive manner.

The deck focuses on using cascade cards like Shardless Agent and Violent Outburst to quickly put powerful creatures like Scion of Draco and Crashing Footfalls onto the battlefield. Leyline spells provide protection and additional benefits, while mana ramp from Gemstone Caverns and other lands help accelerate the deck's strategy. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient threats and disrupt their game plan with Force of Negation. This deck aims to apply pressure and control the game tempo to secure a quick victory.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures, using cards like Stitcher's Supplier and Street Wraith. Once the graveyard is stocked, combo pieces like Persist and Phyrexian Tower are utilized to bring back massive threats like Archon of Cruelty and Overlord of the Balemurk. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Inquisition of Kozilek to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with high-impact creatures and graveyard recursion.

The deck focuses on quickly generating a large amount of mana through rituals and cost reduction effects, with the goal of casting spells like Grapeshot or Glimpse the Impossible multiple times in a turn to deal massive damage to the opponent. It also utilizes cards like Past in Flames and Ral, Monsoon Mage to recur spells from the graveyard or copy them for additional value. The deck aims to win the game in explosive fashion, overwhelming the opponent with a flurry of spells in a single turn.

This deck focuses on using ramp spells and Eldrazi creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats. The key strategy is to accelerate mana production with cards like Talisman of Impulse and Utopia Sprawl to cast large Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker ahead of schedule. Control elements like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Devourer of Destiny and Sowing Mycospawn provide additional removal and board presence. Overall, the deck aims to establish dominance over the opponent through a combination of ramp and control tactics.
